title: Pale Wolf Fix
description: A quick patch for the More Mob Variants missing wolf texture, for Fresh Animations.
body:
This pack provides the More Mob Variants mod with the "missing wolf texture" with Fresh Animations Support.
_If you don't want to use Fresh Animations, just use this patch instead: [MMV - Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-mob-variants-fix)_

**The required resource packs and mod can be found here:**
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [MMV + FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-mob-variants-fresh-animations-addon)
- [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants)

**Place the packs in this order for them to work:**![The in-game resource pack menu with 3 packs enabled. Pale Wolf Fix on the top, More Mob Variants + Fresh Animations in the middle, and Fresh Animations on the bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b2c445a3dc743a290e6826627f8b4467d95ac31.png)

_(The latest version will appear as PaleWolfFix1.0.2 in-game)_

**Thanks to FreshLX for the wolf texture and for creating Fresh Animations**

**Thanks nyuppo for creating More Mob Variants**
